summary: Sprint 2 PASSES on re-evaluation. Generator has now committed the work as 1cafdad 'harness(sprint-02): claude invocation wrapper + mock_claude.py [C2-01..C2-24]' on branch harness/rewrite-in-python-sprint-02. Diff vs harness/rewrite-in-python shows exactly the 6 expected new files: harness/lib/invoke.py, tests/helpers/claude.cmd, tests/helpers/mock_claude.py, tests/layer1/test_invoke.py, harness-state/sprints/sprint-02/generator-log.md, harness-state/sprints/sprint-02/status.json -- no shell/powershell/bats files touched. python tests/run-all.py layer1 reports 'Ran 58 tests in 0.989s OK' with exit code 0 (23 test_invoke + 35 test_utils). All stdlib-only imports verified. Sprint 1 regression suite still green. C2-25 (the only previous failure) is now resolved.

criteriaResults.evidence: from harness.lib import invoke; inspect.signature(invoke.invoke_claude) -> (agent: str, prompt: str, max_turns: int = 50, mcp_config: Optional[str] = None) -> int. Module imports cleanly.

test_basic_argv passes. argv at invoke.py:39-47 contains -p, --agent, --max-turns, --dangerously-skip-permissions, --output-format stream-json, --verbose, each appearing exactly once with correct values.
test_argv_with_settings_present and test_argv_without_settings both pass. invoke.py:50-54 conditionally appends --settings only when HARNESS_ROOT/.claude/settings.json exists.
test_argv_with_mcp_config and test_argv_without_mcp_config both pass. invoke.py:56-57 only appends --mcp-config when value is truthy.
test_claude_not_on_path_raises passes. invoke.py:158-163 calls shutil.which('claude') and raises FileNotFoundError with message containing 'claude' when None is returned.
test_exit_zero (rc=0) and test_exit_nonzero (rc=7) both pass. invoke.py:185-187 returns proc.wait() unchanged.
test_malformed_lines_are_skipped passes with mixed valid/invalid NDJSON. invoke.py:79-82 catches ValueError/TypeError and continues.
test_tool_use_progress_to_stderr passes; stderr output contains both 'Bash' and 'ls'. invoke.py:97-108 emits the line.
test_cost_line_to_stderr passes; stderr contains 'Cost:' and '0.0123'. invoke.py:110-118 emits the cost line.
test_progress_only_in_stderr_not_stdout passes; 'Bash' appears only in stderr capture, never in stdout.

tests/helpers/mock_claude.py exists with shebang '#!/usr/bin/env python3'. test_mock_claude_errors_without_fixture_dir confirms non-zero exit when MOCK_CLAUDE_FIXTURE_DIR is unset (mock_claude.py:212-215). With full env set, planner invocation exits 0.
test_mock_claude_planner_routing passes. mock_claude.py:130-134 copies product-spec-minimal.md and sprint-plan-2sprint.json into harness-state/. Bytes verified equal to fixtures.

test_mock_claude_generator_propose_contract, _generator_implement, _generator_blocked_scenario all pass. mock_claude.py:137-152 routes by 'Propose contract' regex and MOCK_CLAUDE_SCENARIO=fail-generator-blocked correctly.

Evaluator routing implemented in mock_claude.py:154-201 mirrors bash logic for review/Evaluate/regression with revise-then-accept and fail-eval scenarios. Code paths match the bash mock and are exercised in test_mock_claude_logs_and_counters.

test_mock_claude_logs_and_counters passes. 3 invocations produce 3 lines starting with 'call=' and including 'agent=' and 'scenario='. call-count contains '3' and per-agent counts each contain '1'. Format matches bash mock at tests/helpers/claude:44.
test_mock_claude_emits_usage_json passes. stdout contains parseable JSON with session_id and usage.input_tokens/output_tokens (mock_claude.py:105-108).

tests/helpers/claude.cmd contains: '@echo off' + 'python "%~dp0mock_claude.py" %*'. Uses %~dp0 for portable path resolution. shutil.which('claude') with tests/helpers prepended to PATH resolves to claude.CMD. test_path_shim_resolves_claude and test_claude_cmd_shim_present_on_windows both pass.

git log on branch shows tests/helpers/claude last touched in commit d731bdb (predating this branch). git diff harness/rewrite-in-python..harness/rewrite-in-python-sprint-02 -- tests/helpers/claude is empty. Bash mock untouched.

git diff harness/rewrite-in-python..harness/rewrite-in-python-sprint-02 --name-only filtered for .sh/.bash/.ps1/.bats returns NO_SHELL_FILES_MODIFIED. The 6 changed paths are all .py, .cmd, .md, or .json files.

tests/layer1/test_invoke.py contains 23 test methods covering all listed categories: argv (basic/settings/mcp_config), claude-not-found, exit-code, NDJSON malformed, tool_use stderr, cost stderr, PATH shim. Well above the >=8 threshold.
python tests/run-all.py layer1 -> 'Ran 58 tests in 0.989s\nOK'. Exit code 0. Includes both test_invoke (23 tests) and test_utils (35 tests) suites.

All 35 test_utils tests still pass within the 58-test layer1 run (visible in tail output: SlugifyTests, JsonReadTests, LogHelperTests, SprintDirTests, UpdateHandoffTests, etc. all 'ok'). No sprint-1 regressions.

invoke.py imports: __future__, json, os, shutil, subprocess, sys, pathlib.Path, typing -- all stdlib. mock_claude.py imports: __future__, json, os, re, shutil, sys, tempfile, pathlib.Path -- all stdlib. No third-party packages.

Python mock produces fixtures byte-identical to bash mock for planner agent (test_mock_claude_planner_routing asserts spec.read_bytes() == fixture bytes). Bash mock unchanged so equivalence holds by construction.

git log --oneline harness/rewrite-in-python-sprint-02 shows commit '1cafdad harness(sprint-02): claude invocation wrapper + mock_claude.py [C2-01..C2-24]'. Message starts with 'harness(sprint-02):' and references criterion ids in [C2-01..C2-24] form. Conformant commit count: 1.

regressionResults.evidence: test_utils suite: 35/35 tests still pass within the layer1 run. utils.slugify, JsonRead, LogHelpers, SprintDir, SprintPad, UpdateHandoff, UpdateProgress, UpdateRegressionRegistry, LogCost all 'ok'.

recommendations: Optional: add a dedicated evaluator-routing test method in tests/layer1/test_invoke.py to make C2-14 directly verifiable (currently only indirectly covered via test_mock_claude_logs_and_counters).
Proceed to merge harness/rewrite-in-python-sprint-02 into harness/rewrite-in-python and tag harness/sprint-02/pass.
